metadata.note: The 4 SRD 5.2 backgrounds. Each grants ability-score increases (player-allocated per ability_score_rule), an Origin feat (in load_content('feats')), two skill proficiencies, a tool proficiency, and starting equipment. The ability increases are a parameterized `component` (see dndwright.component_from_content): the modal +2/+1 spread, where `choices` fills {plus_two}/{plus_one} from this background's three abilities. The alternative +1/+1/+1 spread is composed as three +1 contributions.

backgrounds.name: Acolyte
backgrounds.equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Calligrapher’s Supplies, Book (prayers), Holy Symbol, Parchment (10 sheets), Robe, 8 GP; or (B) 50 GP
backgrounds.ability_score_rule: Increase one of these by 2 and another by 1, or increase all three by 1 (max 20).

backgrounds.name: Criminal
backgrounds.equipment: Choose A or B: (A) 2 Daggers, Thieves’ Tools, Crowbar, 2 Pouches, Traveler’s Clothes, 16 GP; or (B) 50 GP
backgrounds.ability_score_rule: Increase one of these by 2 and another by 1, or increase all three by 1 (max 20).

backgrounds.name: Sage
backgrounds.equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Quarterstaff, Calligrapher’s Supplies, Book (history), Parchment (8 sheets), Robe, 8 GP; or (B) 50 GP
backgrounds.ability_score_rule: Increase one of these by 2 and another by 1, or increase all three by 1 (max 20).

backgrounds.name: Soldier
backgrounds.tool_proficiency: Choose one kind of Gaming Set (see “Equipment”)
backgrounds.equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Spear, Shortbow, 20 Arrows, Gaming Set (same as above), Healer’s Kit, Quiver, Traveler’s Clothes, 14 GP; or (B) 50 GP
backgrounds.ability_score_rule: Increase one of these by 2 and another by 1, or increase all three by 1 (max 20).
